message:
test(fwc): add 29 history replay/compare + lifecycle mutation + pending approval tests

History replay/clone (7 tests, bead 1g7z0.28.2): entry lookup, clone
with input override, preflight, dry-run, validation
History compare/diff (7 tests, bead 1g7z0.28.3): two-entry diff,
self-compare, not-found, field-level changes, status diff, cross-
connector mismatch, result handle delta
Lifecycle mutations (10 tests, bead 1g7z0.8.2): enable/disable/start/
stop/restart offline, idempotent enable, confirmation, state transition,
unknown connector, graceful timeout
Pending approvals (5 tests, bead 1g7z0.28.5): empty count, list
structure, blocked actions with hints, resumable queue

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
